query: Orchestrate the full squad flow for: add a trivial helper to hooks/utils.sh, add a smoke test, and mention the helper in plugins/md-writer/README.md.
expected_behavior: Phase 1: invokes /decompose, produces a 3-task manifest with disjoint target_files
Stops at checkpoint 1 and prints the manifest summary (task count, fork/named split, worktree yes/no, dependency graph)
On user approval, Phase 2 invokes /worktree, creates two isolated worktrees (helper, smoke-test) and leaves docs in shared cwd
Stops at checkpoint 2 and prints the worktree map

On user approval, Phase 3 invokes /spawn, dispatches children in parallel where dependencies permit, collects squad.child-return.v1 returns, cherry-picks commits onto squad/<run-id>/integration in merge_order, runs validation gates
Ends with 'Integration branch ready: squad/<run-id>/integration. Run /commit to ship.' — does not invoke /commit itself
If the user aborts at either checkpoint without --keep, runs /worktree cleanup:<run-id> automatically
Never runs git push, git reset --hard, or git commit --amend at any phase
